creator: remko@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

There are a lot of things missing in this report, one of them being a 
normal entry which might be added to the list. That said I looked around 
on the interwebs and found your page, it does not mention anything about 
FreeBSD. Ofcourse I understand that if it's webbased it might be 
supported, but that's not a very good argument to add you on the site. I 
will close this PR instead. Thanks for using FreeBSD!
